---
title: " "
pagetitle: "Lonnie Ernst | Home"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    df_print: paged
    css: styles.css
---

<div class="hero">
<h1>Lonnie Ernst | Biotechnologist</h1>
<p>Biotechnology &bull; Molecular Biology &bull; Bioinformatics &bull; Biomanufacturing</p>
</div>

<p class="lead-intro">I'm a biotechnology professional with hands-on experience in molecular biology, biomanufacturing, and lab quality systems, alongside a growing interest in using data and code as research tools.</p>

<div class="badge-row">
<span class="badge">Plasmid Construction</span>
<span class="badge">PCR</span>
<span class="badge">DNA Extraction</span>
<span class="badge">Cell Culture</span>
<span class="badge">Aseptic &amp; Sterile Technique</span>
<span class="badge">Media &amp; Reagent Production</span>
<span class="badge gold">R</span>
<span class="badge gold">Data Analysis</span>
<span class="badge gold">Command Line</span>
<span class="badge gold">Sequence Analysis</span>
</div>

<div class="chevron-divider"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>

## Quick Links

<div class="card-links">
<a class="card-link" href="cv.html"><span class="card-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/><path d="M14 2v6h6"/><path d="M9 13h6"/><path d="M9 17h6"/></svg></span><span class="card-label">My CV</span></a>
<a class="card-link" href="research.html"><span class="card-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M9 2h6"/><path d="M10 2v6.5L4.5 19a2 2 0 0 0 1.8 3h11.4a2 2 0 0 0 1.8-3L14 8.5V2"/><path d="M7 15h10"/></svg></span><span class="card-label">Research Projects</span></a>
<a class="card-link" href="about.html"><span class="card-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="8" r="4"/><path d="M4 20c0-4 3.6-7 8-7s8 3 8 7"/></svg></span><span class="card-label">About Me</span></a>
<a class="card-link" href="contact.html"><span class="card-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="2" y="4" width="20" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="m2 7 10 6 10-6"/></svg></span><span class="card-label">Contact Me</span></a>
</div>

<div class="chevron-divider"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>

## About Me

I hold a bachelor's degree in Biotechnology and work across both the bench and the process from molecular cloning and cell culture to media production and lab documentation. I'm drawn to problems that combine careful experimental work with the kind of pattern-finding that data analysis makes possible.

Outside of work, you'll probably find me tending my garden, exploring new PC hardware, or playing Slay the Spire.

<div class="chevron-divider"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>

## Featured Project

My ongoing research involves the genetic modification of cyanobacteria to break down persistent organic pollutants and inhibit toxin production.

[See BPH Project](research-bph.html)
